title: Tales from the Endor Woods

'''''Tales from the Endor Woods''''' is an animated film released on [[Wikipedia:DVD|DVD]] in [[2004]]. It is a feature-length compilation of the [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] episodes "[[Wicket's Wagon]]," "[[The Travelling Jindas]]," "[[To Save Deej]]," and "[[Asha (episode)|Asha]]." As with [[The Haunted Village (film)|''The Haunted Village'']], the episodes have all been re-scored and the original opening and closing titles are missing. Additionally, this film opens with a new narration by an older [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Wystri Warrick]].

==Development==
===Production===
In 1997, eight episodes of the [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] animated series were edited together as two full length films. Episodes 2, 1, 3, and 9 were edited together to make [[The Haunted Village (film)|''The Haunted Village'']], and Episodes 10 ("[[Wicket's Wagon]]"), 5 ("[[The Travelling Jindas]]"), 4 ("[[To Save Deej]]"), and 13 ("[[Asha (episode)|Asha]]") were edited together to make ''Tales from the Endor Woods''.<ref>{{CargoBay|url=item-detail/7141|text=Cargo Bay: Droids: The Pirates and the Prince}}</ref><ref>{{Rebelscum|url=droids-ewoks.asp|text=Droids and Ewoks: A Home Video History}}</ref> These compilation films were later released in several [[Wikipedia:DVD region code|Region 4]] countries, such as Brazil (the Brazilian edition was released in [[2005]] with the Region 1 and 4 codes on the same disc) and Australia. ''The Haunted Village'' combines four loosely related episodes into one story, while ''Tales from the Endor Woods'' connects four seemingly unrelated stories via a voiceover by [[Alex Lindsay]] (digital effects artist for [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''The Phantom Menace'']])—intended to be an adult Wicket.<ref>{{IMDb|url=name/nm0512181|text=Alex Lindsay}}</ref> The original opening credits and theme song are not included as part of the films, and were replaced with simple credit sequences and new scores by [[Marco D'Ambrosio]].

==Release and reception==
[[File:Ewoks_double_feature.jpg|thumb|150px|The cover of the 2004 DVD release of ''Star Wars: Ewoks'']]

''Tales from the Endor Woods'' was released on Region 1 [[Wikipedia:DVD|DVD]] on [[November 23]], [[2004]] under the title ''[[Star Wars Animated Adventures: Ewoks]]''. It contained both ''The Haunted Village'' and ''Tales from the Endor Woods'' on a double-sided disc.<ref name="SWArchive-A Closer Look at the Ewoks & Droids DVDs">{{SWArchive|url=eu/tv/classic/news20040826.html|text=A Closer Look at the ''Ewoks & Droids'' DVDs}}</ref>
